system.specialQuality: can sense anything that happens in its lair (but might not think to)
system.moves:
- Overawe anyone in its presence
- Twist, mutate, or transform living things with a gesture
- Wield nearby plants and beasts as extensions of itself
- Regenerate wounds from anything but orichalcum (page 162)

No Fomoraij is truly typical; use the stats above as a starting point. A Fomoraij’s constraint (page 137) dictates its in- stinct. Add or change its tags, stats, special qualities, and moves based on the themes (page 416), constraint, lair, and forms (page 137) that you’ve identified.
